images.prompt: Professional commercial product photography. The Chubby Buttons CB2 Patriot is a compact rounded rectangular wearable Bluetooth remote with a red, white and blue matte silicone body featuring 5 large raised tactile silicone buttons. The device has the CB2 logo on the front and attaches via an adjustable elastic armband. Flat lay on rustic weathered wood: CB2 device with ski goggles, premium earbuds, and coffee, warm overhead natural lighting, editorial style. Shot with 85mm lens at f/2.8, shallow depth of field with product in tack-sharp focus. Adventurous energetic atmosphere, premium outdoor lifestyle brand aesthetic.  dramatic professional lighting with warm color grading. preserving the exact product appearance, all 5 buttons clearly visible.  maintaining the exact same product proportions, button count, button layout, color, logo placement, and surface texture from the reference image. dramatic visually striking environment with depth and atmosphere. product resting naturally and grounded in the scene with realistic shadow and physical contact. Clean precise product details with photorealistic rendering.
